data_evidence_gates.required: All P0 aggregate-count tasks are reviewed and the visit / CTA / LINE-add / test-day sample gate is met.
data_evidence_gates.next_action: Fill and review aggregate-only P0 counts; do not use customer-level data.

data_evidence_gates.required: All P1 LINE-add, lead, deal, and quality outcome counts are reviewed, including explicit zeroes.
data_evidence_gates.next_action: Fill aggregate-only P1 outcomes and quality flags; keep customer identities outside the engine.

data_evidence_gates.required: At least one trusted scoring source contributes real, privacy-safe events that pass the source-trust gate.
data_evidence_gates.next_action: Compile reviewed aggregate inputs, preview them, and apply only after the explicit real-data gate.

items.blocked_by: Read-only Cloudflare inventory confirms the exact dedicated Growth Loop D1 now exists and matches wrangler.jsonc, but no table query or remote schema migration has been approved or performed.
items.resume_when: Owner confirms the observed database provenance, explicitly approves remote migration, and records recurring_aggregate_read_approved=true only if weekly grouped-count reads are allowed after reviewing local_schema_idempotency_and_constraints_verified; local config guard remains prepared_but_blocked_owner_d1_approval_or_inventory.

items.blocked_by: Read-only observation confirms Candidate deployment 5073984b-bcc0-40f1-a331-daaadd741071 / version 133d27b0-36e5-41e8-96ec-b55925b7b30a is healthy and wired to the Champion, but owner provenance evidence is not recorded. A redeploy is not currently required.
items.resume_when: Owner confirms the observed Worker name, URL, deployment/version reference, health result, and rollback reference in owner_gate_evidence.json. Redeploy only if the observed version is rejected.

items.blocked_by: The LINE-only Champion contract is observable live, but deployment provenance is not owner evidence and any redeploy remains a production action.
items.resume_when: Owner confirms the current live deployment provenance, reviews the prepared local Champion commit and release packet, and separately approves any redeploy target and rollback plan.

items.blocked_by: Primary link changes affect public acquisition flow.
items.resume_when: Owner approves exact URL, traffic share, and duration.

items.blocked_by: External posting and LINE push remain human-only.
items.resume_when: Owner opens the platform and manually confirms Publish, Send, Broadcast, or Schedule.

items.blocked_by: The Champion feature commit and exact draft PR packet are prepared locally (integration_already_merged_followup_repairs_only), but branch push / PR creation is an external GitHub write; the engine bundle remains a separate local-only handoff.
items.resume_when: Owner reviews the exact commit and PR body, then explicitly approves branch push or draft PR creation. Merge and deploy remain blocked.

items.blocked_by: The launch sequence combines remote D1, production Worker, public A/B route, and GitHub publishing decisions.
items.resume_when: Owner explicitly approves the individual external gates in owner_approval_pack.md.

items.blocked_by: Customer data, payments, refunds, and ECPay are hard red lines.
